listen.description: Does this rule have listen access?

manage.description: Does this rule have manage access?

name.description: The name of the notification hub authorization rule.

namespace_name.description: The name of the notification hub namespace.

notification_hub_name.description: Name of the notification hub for which the authorization rule needs to be created.

send.description: Does this rule have send access?

timeouts.type: object({create: optional(string), delete: optional(string), read: optional(string), update: optional(string)})

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.
